overall.description: Gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a player character in heavy armor traversing a dark fantasy swamp environment. The character walks through shallow water and marsh paths, engages in brief combat with a fiery enemy, and continues through an area with stone walls and wooden debris under a dramatic, stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow swamp with lily pads and tall reeds

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water towards a distant enemy on the path ahead

notable_agents.action: enemy with glowing red aura standing on the path ahead

entered.detail: murky shallow water covering the ground with reflections
scattered lily pads floating on the water surface
tall brown reeds and grasses lining the water edges
dense forest of dead and dying trees on the hillside
small stone structure or ruins on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The player character walks through a shallow swamp with lily pads under a dark, overcast sky. Tall reeds line the water's edge and a distant enemy with a red glow stands on the path ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow marsh path with stone walls

events.description: player engages in melee combat with the fiery red enemy
enemy is defeated and explodes in a burst of red flames

agents.ego_description: attacking the glowing enemy with melee weapon, dodging and striking

notable_agents.action: fiery humanoid enemy attacking with glowing red weapon and body

entered.detail: low stone walls lining the sides of the path

segments.scene_description: The player engages in combat with a fiery enemy on a narrow marsh path. After defeating the enemy, the character continues along the path flanked by low stone walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding marsh path with stone walls and tall grass

events.description: sky transitions from dark teal to dramatic orange and purple sunset clouds

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding path between stone walls and tall reeds

entered.detail: wooden posts or stakes stuck in the ground along the path
dark storm clouds with orange and red sunset lighting

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow marsh path enclosed by stone walls and dense tall grass. The lighting shifts dramatically as the sky opens up to reveal stormy sunset clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: marsh path with wooden barricades and destroyed wagons

events.description: path enters area with wooden barricades and destroyed supply wagons

agents.ego_description: navigating through debris and broken wooden structures in the marsh

entered.detail: broken wooden fences and barricades along the path
destroyed wooden supply wagons and carts with scattered debris
white supply sacks and barrels scattered around the wagons
skeletal remains lying on the ground near the wagons

segments.scene_description: The path opens into an area littered with destroyed wooden wagons, supply sacks, and skeletal remains. The character walks through the debris field under the dramatic stormy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gloomy, overcast swamp that gradually opens into a debris-strewn wasteland under a stormy sunset. It begins with the character wading through shallow water and lily pads, moving past tall reeds toward a glowing red enemy in the distance. As the character engages and defeats the fiery foe, the scene shifts from the open marsh to a narrow path flanked by low stone walls and dense grass. The lighting then transforms dramatically as the dark sky opens to reveal swirling sunset clouds, guiding the character forward until the path expands into a wide field. Finally, the camera follows the character through a desolate landscape littered with destroyed wooden wagons, supply sacks, and skeletal remains under the turbulent sky.
